TestCase.name: testCannotProject
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, c, b + 1 FROM MyTable
LogicalProject(select=[a, c, +($1, 1) AS EXPR$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])
LogicalProject(select=[a, c, +($1, 1) AS EXPR$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])

TestCase.name: testCannotProjectWithVirtualColumn
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, c, d, b + 1 FROM VirtualTable
LogicalProject(select=[a, c, d, +($1, 1) AS EXPR$3]) +- LogicalProject(select=[a, b, c, +($0, 1) AS d]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, VirtualTable]])
LogicalProject(select=[a, c, d, +($1, 1) AS EXPR$3]) +- LogicalProject(select=[a, b, c, +($0, 1) AS d]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, VirtualTable]])

TestCase.name: testComplicatedNestedProject
TestCase.Resource: SELECT id, deepNested.nested1.name AS nestedName, (`deepNestedWith.`.`.value` + `deepNestedWith.`.nested.`.value`) AS nestedSum FROM NestedTable
LogicalProject(select=[id, $1.nested1.name AS nestedName, +($3..value, $3.nested..value) AS nestedSum]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, NestedTable]])

LogicalProject(select=[id, deepNested_nested1_name AS nestedName, +($2, $3) AS nestedSum]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, NestedTable, project=[id, deepNested_nested1_name, deepNestedWith._.value, deepNestedWith._nested_.value], metadata=[]]])

TestCase.name: testMetadataProjectionWithoutProjectionPushDownWhenNotSupported
TestCase.Resource: SELECT m1, metadata FROM T2
LogicalProject(select=[m1, metadata]) +- LogicalProject(select=[m1, metadata, m3]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T2, metadata=[m1, m2, m3]]])
LogicalProject(select=[m1, metadata]) +- LogicalProject(select=[m1, metadata, m3]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T2, metadata=[m1, m2, m3]]])

TestCase.name: testMetadataProjectionWithoutProjectionPushDownWhenNotSupportedAndNoneSelected
TestCase.Resource: SELECT 1 FROM T4
LogicalProject(select=[1 AS EXPR$0]) +- LogicalProject(select=[m1, metadata, m3]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T4, metadata=[m1, m2, m3]]])
LogicalProject(select=[1 AS EXPR$0]) +- LogicalProject(select=[m1, metadata, m3]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T4, metadata=[m1, m2, m3]]])

TestCase.name: testMetadataProjectionWithoutProjectionPushDownWhenSupported
TestCase.Resource: SELECT m1, metadata FROM T1
LogicalProject(select=[m1, metadata]) +- LogicalProject(select=[m1, metadata, m3]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T1, metadata=[m1, m2, m3]]])
LogicalProject(select=[m1, metadata]) +- LogicalProject(select=[m1, metadata, m3]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T1, metadata=[m1, m2, m3]]])

TestCase.name: testMetadataProjectionWithoutProjectionPushDownWhenSupportedAndNoneSelected
TestCase.Resource: SELECT 1 FROM T3
LogicalProject(select=[1 AS EXPR$0]) +- LogicalProject(select=[m1, metadata, m3]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T3, metadata=[m1, m2, m3]]])
LogicalProject(select=[1 AS EXPR$0]) +- LogicalProject(select=[m1, metadata, m3]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T3, metadata=[m1, m2, m3]]])

TestCase.name: testNestProjectWithMetadata
TestCase.Resource: SELECT id, deepNested.nested1 AS nested1, deepNested.nested1.`value` + deepNested.nested2.num + metadata_1 as results FROM MetadataTable

LogicalProject(select=[id, $1.nested1 AS nested1, +(+($1.nested1.value, $1.nested2.num), $2) AS results]) +- LogicalProject(select=[id, deepNested, metadata_1, metadata_2, CAST($2):BIGINT AS metadata_3]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MetadataTable, metadata=[metadata_1, metadata_2]]])

LogicalProject(select=[id, $1.nested1 AS nested1, +(+($1.nested1.value, $1.nested2.num), $2) AS results]) +- LogicalProject(select=[id, deepNested, metadata_1, metadata_2, CAST($2):BIGINT AS metadata_3]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MetadataTable, project=[id, deepNested], metadata=[metadata_1, metadata_2]]])

TestCase.name: testNestProjectWithUpsertSource
TestCase.Resource: SELECT id, deepNested.nested1 AS nested1, deepNested.nested1.`value` + deepNested.nested2.num + metadata_1 as results FROM MetadataTable

LogicalProject(select=[id, $1.nested1 AS nested1, +(+($1.nested1.value, $1.nested2.num), $2) AS results]) +- LogicalProject(select=[id, deepNested, metadata_1, metadata_2, CAST($2):BIGINT AS metadata_3]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MetadataTable, metadata=[metadata_1, metadata_2]]])

LogicalProject(select=[id, $1.nested1 AS nested1, +(+($1.nested1.value, $1.nested2.num), $2) AS results]) +- LogicalProject(select=[id, deepNested, metadata_1, metadata_2, CAST($2):BIGINT AS metadata_3]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MetadataTable, project=[id, deepNested], metadata=[metadata_1, metadata_2]]])

TestCase.name: testNestedProject
TestCase.Resource: SELECT id, deepNested.nested1.name AS nestedName, nested.`value` AS nestedValue, deepNested.nested2.flag AS nestedFlag, deepNested.nested2.num AS nestedNum FROM NestedTable

LogicalProject(select=[id, $1.nested1.name AS nestedName, $2.value AS nestedValue, $1.nested2.flag AS nestedFlag, $1.nested2.num AS nestedNum]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, NestedTable]])

LogicalProject(select=[id, deepNested_nested1_name AS nestedName, nested_value AS nestedValue, deepNested_nested2_flag AS nestedFlag, deepNested_nested2_num AS nestedNum]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, NestedTable, project=[id, deepNested_nested1_name, deepNested_nested2_flag, deepNested_nested2_num, nested_value], metadata=[]]])

TestCase.name: testNestedProjectFieldAccessWithITEM
TestCase.Resource: SELECT `Result`.`Mid`.data_arr[ID].`value`, `Result`.`Mid`.data_map['item'].`value` FROM NestedItemTable

LogicalProject(select=[ITEM($2.Mid.data_arr, $0).value AS EXPR$0, ITEM($2.Mid.data_map, _UTF-16LE'item').value AS EXPR$1]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, NestedItemTable]])

LogicalProject(select=[ITEM($0, $2).value AS EXPR$0, ITEM($1, _UTF-16LE'item').value AS EXPR$1]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, NestedItemTable, project=[Result_Mid_data_arr, Result_Mid_data_map, ID], metadata=[]]])

TestCase.name: testNestedProjectFieldAccessWithITEMContainsTopLevelAccess
TestCase.Resource: SELECT `Result`.`Mid`.data_arr[2].`value`, `Result`.`Mid`.data_arr[ID].`value`, `Result`.`Mid`.data_map['item'].`value`, `Result`.`Mid` FROM NestedItemTable

LogicalProject(select=[ITEM($2.Mid.data_arr, 2).value AS EXPR$0, ITEM($2.Mid.data_arr, $0).value AS EXPR$1, ITEM($2.Mid.data_map, _UTF-16LE'item').value AS EXPR$2, $2.Mid AS Mid]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, NestedItemTable]])

LogicalProject(select=[ITEM($0.data_arr, 2).value AS EXPR$0, ITEM($0.data_arr, $1).value AS EXPR$1, ITEM($0.data_map, _UTF-16LE'item').value AS EXPR$2, Result_Mid AS Mid]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, NestedItemTable, project=[Result_Mid, ID], metadata=[]]])

TestCase.name: testNestedProjectFieldAccessWithITEMWithConstantIndex
TestCase.Resource: SELECT `Result`.`Mid`.data_arr[2].`value`, `Result`.`Mid`.data_arr FROM NestedItemTable
LogicalProject(select=[ITEM($2.Mid.data_arr, 2).value AS EXPR$0, $2.Mid.data_arr AS data_arr]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, NestedItemTable]])

LogicalProject(select=[ITEM($0, 2).value AS EXPR$0, Result_Mid_data_arr AS data_arr]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, NestedItemTable, project=[Result_Mid_data_arr], metadata=[]]])

TestCase.name: testNestedProjectFieldAccessWithNestedArrayAndRows
TestCase.Resource: SELECT `chart`.`result`[1].`meta`.`symbol` FROM ItemTable

LogicalProject(select=[CAST(ITEM(CAST($5.result):RecordType:peek_no_expand(RecordType:peek_no_expand(VARCHAR(2147483647) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" NOT NULL symbol) NOT NULL meta) NOT NULL ARRAY, 1).meta.symbol):VARCHAR(2147483647) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" AS EXPR$0]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, ItemTable]])

LogicalProject(select=[CAST(ITEM(CAST($0.result):RecordType:peek_no_expand(RecordType:peek_no_expand(VARCHAR(2147483647) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" NOT NULL symbol) NOT NULL meta) NOT NULL ARRAY, 1).meta.symbol):VARCHAR(2147483647) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" AS EXPR$0]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, ItemTable, project=[chart], metadata=[]]])

TestCase.name: testProjectFieldAccessWithITEM
TestCase.Resource: SELECT `Result`.data_arr[ID].`value`, `Result`.data_map['item'].`value`, `outer_array`[1], `outer_array`[ID], `outer_map`['item'] FROM ItemTable

LogicalProject(select=[ITEM($2.data_arr, $0).value AS EXPR$0, ITEM($2.data_map, _UTF-16LE'item').value AS EXPR$1, ITEM($3, 1) AS EXPR$2, ITEM($3, $0) AS EXPR$3, ITEM($4, _UTF-16LE'item') AS EXPR$4]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, ItemTable]])

LogicalProject(select=[ITEM($0.data_arr, $1).value AS EXPR$0, ITEM($0.data_map, _UTF-16LE'item').value AS EXPR$1, ITEM($2, 1) AS EXPR$2, ITEM($2, $1) AS EXPR$3, ITEM($3, _UTF-16LE'item') AS EXPR$4]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, ItemTable, project=[Result, ID, outer_array, outer_map], metadata=[]]])

TestCase.name: testProjectWithDuplicateMetadataKey
TestCase.Resource: SELECT id, metadata_3, metadata_1 FROM MetadataTable

LogicalProject(select=[id, metadata_3, metadata_1]) +- LogicalProject(select=[id, deepNested, metadata_1, metadata_2, CAST($2):BIGINT AS metadata_3]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MetadataTable, metadata=[metadata_1, metadata_2]]])

LogicalProject(select=[id, metadata_3, metadata_1]) +- LogicalProject(select=[id, deepNested, metadata_1, metadata_2, CAST($2):BIGINT AS metadata_3]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MetadataTable, project=[id, deepNested], metadata=[metadata_1, metadata_2]]])

TestCase.name: testProjectWithMapType
TestCase.Resource: SELECT id, testMap['e'] FROM NestedTable
LogicalProject(select=[id, ITEM($5, _UTF-16LE'e') AS EXPR$1]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, NestedTable]])
LogicalProject(select=[id, ITEM($1, _UTF-16LE'e') AS EXPR$1]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, NestedTable, project=[id, testMap], metadata=[]]])

TestCase.name: testProjectWithUdf
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, TRIM(c) FROM MyTable
LogicalProject(select=[a, TRIM(FLAG(BOTH), _UTF-16LE' ', $2) AS EXPR$1]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])
LogicalProject(select=[a, TRIM(FLAG(BOTH), _UTF-16LE' ', $1) AS EXPR$1]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable, project=[a, c], metadata=[]]])

TestCase.name: testProjectWithUdfWithVirtualColumn
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, my_udf(d) FROM VirtualTable
LogicalProject(select=[a, my_udf($3) AS EXPR$1]) +- LogicalProject(select=[a, b, c, +($0, 1) AS d]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, VirtualTable]])
LogicalProject(select=[a, my_udf($3) AS EXPR$1]) +- LogicalProject(select=[a, b, c, +($0, 1) AS d]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, VirtualTable]])

TestCase.name: testProjectWithoutInputRef
TestCase.Resource: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM MyTable
LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[COUNT()]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])
LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[COUNT()]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])

TestCase.name: testProjectionIncludingOnlyMetadata
TestCase.Resource: SELECT metadata FROM T5
LogicalProject(select=[metadata]) +- LogicalProject(select=[f1, metadata, m3]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T5, metadata=[m2, m3]]])
LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T5, project=[], metadata=[m2]]])

TestCase.name: testProjectionWithMetadataAndPhysicalFields
TestCase.Resource: SELECT metadata, f1 FROM T5
LogicalProject(select=[metadata, f1]) +- LogicalProject(select=[f1, metadata, m3]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T5, metadata=[m2, m3]]])
LogicalProject(select=[metadata, f1]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, T5, project=[f1], metadata=[m2]]])

TestCase.name: testSimpleProject
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, c FROM MyTable
LogicalProject(select=[a, c]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])
LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable, project=[a, c], metadata=[]]])

TestCase.name: testSimpleProjectWithVirtualColumn
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, d FROM VirtualTable
LogicalProject(select=[a, d]) +- LogicalProject(select=[a, b, c, +($0, 1) AS d]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, VirtualTable]])
LogicalProject(select=[a, d]) +- LogicalProject(select=[a, b, c, +($0, 1) AS d]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, VirtualTable]])
